name: Kingdom Hearts
description: Kingdom Hearts is an action RPG following Sora on his journey through many worlds to find Riku and Kairi.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Final Rest Door Key
options.description: Determines what grants the player the Final Rest Door Key.

options.label: End Of The World Unlock
options.description: Determines how End of the World is unlocked.

options.label: Required Lucky Emblems Eotw
options.description: If End of the World Unlock is set to "Lucky Emblems", determines the number of Lucky Emblems required.

options.label: Required Lucky Emblems Door
options.description: If Final Rest Door Key is set to "Lucky Emblems", determines the number of Lucky Emblems required.

options.label: Lucky Emblems In Pool
options.description: Determines the number of Lucky Emblems in the item pool.

options.label: Required Postcards
options.description: If "Final Rest Door Key" is set to "Postcards", defines how many postcards are required.

options.label: Required Puppies
options.description: If "Final Rest Door Key" is set to "Puppies", defines how many puppies are required.

options.label: Super Bosses
options.description: Toggle whether to include checks behind Super Bosses.

options.label: Atlantica
options.description: Toggle whether to include checks in Atlantica.

options.label: Hundred Acre Wood
options.description: Toggle whether to include checks in the 100 Acre Wood.

options.label: Cups
options.description: Determines which cups have their locations added to the multiworld.

options.label: Randomize Puppies
options.description: If OFF, the "Puppy" item is worth 3 puppies and puppies are placed in vanilla locations.

options.label: Puppy Value
options.description: Determines how many dalmatian puppies are given when a puppy item is found.

options.label: Starting Worlds
options.description: Number of random worlds to start with in addition to Traverse Town, which is always available.

options.label: Keyblades Unlock Chests
options.description: If toggled on, the player is required to have a certain keyblade to open chests in certain worlds.

options.label: Interact In Battle
options.description: Allow Sora to talk to people, examine objects, and open chests in battle.

options.label: Exp Multiplier
options.description: Determines the multiplier to apply to EXP gained.

options.label: Logic Difficulty
options.description: Determines what the randomizer logic may expect you to do to reach certain locations.

options.label: Extra Shared Abilities
options.description: If on, adds extra shared abilities to the pool.

options.label: Exp Zero In Pool
options.description: If on, adds EXP Zero ability to the item pool.

options.label: Randomize Emblem Pieces
options.description: If off, the Hollow Bastion emblem pieces are in their vanilla locations.

options.label: Randomize Postcards
options.description: Determines how Postcards are randomized All: All Postcards are randomized Chests: Only the 3 Postcards in chests are randomized Vanilla: Postcards are in their original location

options.label: Donald Death Link
options.description: If Donald is KO'ed, so is Sora.

options.label: Goofy Death Link
options.description: If Goofy is KO'ed, so is Sora.

options.label: Keyblade Stats
options.description: Determines whether Keyblade stats should be randomized.

options.label: Bad Starting Weapons
options.description: Forces Kingdom Key, Dream Sword, Dream Shield, and Dream Staff to have vanilla stats.

options.label: Keyblade Min Str
options.description: Determines the minimum STR bonus a keyblade can have.

options.label: Keyblade Max Str
options.description: Determines the maximum STR bonus a keyblade can have.

options.label: Keyblade Min Crit Rate
options.description: Determines the minimum Crit Rate bonus a keyblade can have.

options.label: Keyblade Max Crit Rate
options.description: Determines the maximum Crit Rate bonus a keyblade can have.

options.label: Keyblade Min Crit Str
options.description: Determines the minimum Crit STR bonus a keyblade can have.

options.label: Keyblade Max Crit Str
options.description: Determines the maximum Crit STR bonus a keyblade can have.

options.label: Keyblade Min Recoil
options.description: Determines the minimum recoil a keyblade can have.

options.label: Keyblade Max Recoil
options.description: Determines the maximum recoil a keyblade can have.

options.label: Keyblade Min Mp
options.description: Determines the minimum MP bonus a keyblade can have.

options.label: Keyblade Max Mp
options.description: Determines the maximum MP bonus a keyblade can have.

options.label: Level Checks
options.description: Determines the maximum level for which checks can be obtained.

options.label: Slot 2 Level Checks
options.description: Determines how many levels have an additional item.

options.label: Force Stats On Levels
options.description: If this value is less than the value for Level Checks, this determines the minimum level from which only stat ups are obtained at level up locations.

options.label: Strength Increase
options.description: Determines the number of Strength Increases to add to the multiworld.

options.label: Defense Increase
options.description: Determines the number of Defense Increases to add to the multiworld.

options.label: Hp Increase
options.description: Determines the number of HP Increases to add to the multiworld.

options.label: Ap Increase
options.description: Determines the number of AP Increases to add to the multiworld.

options.label: Mp Increase
options.description: Determines the number of MP Increases to add to the multiworld.

options.label: Accessory Slot Increase
options.description: Determines the number of Accessory Slot Increases to add to the multiworld.

options.label: Item Slot Increase
options.description: Determines the number of Item Slot Increases to add to the multiworld.

options.label: Jungle Slider
options.description: Determines whether checks are behind the Jungle Slider minigame.

options.label: Starting Tools
options.description: Determines whether you start with Scan and Dodge Roll.

options.label: Remote Items
options.description: Determines if items can be placed on locations in your own world in such a way that will force them to be remote items.

options.label: Shorten Go Mode
options.description: If on, the player warps to the final cutscene after defeating Ansem 1 > Darkside > Ansem 2, skipping World of Chaos.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: If Sora is KO'ed, the other players with "Death Link" on will also be KO'ed.

options.label: Destiny Islands
options.description: If on, Adds a Destiny Islands item and a number of Raft Materials items to the pool.

options.label: Orichalcum In Pool
options.description: Determines how much Orichalcum, one of the two synthesis items, is in the item pool.

options.label: Orichalcum Price
options.description: Determines the cost of Orichalcum in each shop.

options.label: Mythril In Pool
options.description: Determines how much Mythril, one of the two synthesis items, is in the item pool.

options.label: Mythril Price
options.description: Determines the cost of Mythril in each shop.

options.label: One Hp
options.description: If on, forces Sora's max HP to 1 and removes the low health warning sound.

options.label: Four By Three
options.description: If on, changes the aspect ratio to 4 by 3.

options.label: Auto Attack
options.description: If on, you can combo by holding confirm.

options.label: Beep Hack
options.description: If on, removes low health warning sound.

options.label: Consistent Finishers
options.description: If on, 30% chance finishers are now 100% chance.

options.label: Early Skip
options.description: If on, allows skipping cutscenes immediately that normally take time to be able to skip.

options.label: Fast Camera
options.description: If on, speeds up camera movement and camera centering.

options.label: Faster Animations
options.description: If on, speeds up animations during which you can't play.

options.label: Unlock 0 Volume
options.description: If on, volume 1 mutes the audio channel.

options.label: Unskippable
options.description: If on, makes unskippable cutscenes skippable.

options.label: Auto Save
options.description: If on, enables auto saving.

options.label: Warp Anywhere
options.description: If on, enables the player to warp at any time, even when not at a save point.

options.label: Randomize Party Member Starting Accessories
options.description: If on, the 10 accessories that some party members (Aladdin, Ariel, Jack, Peter Pan, Beast) start with are randomized.

options.label: Max Level For Slot 2 Level Checks
options.description: Determines the max level for slot 2 level checks.

options.label: Randomize Ap Costs
options.description: Off: No randomization Shuffle: Ability AP Costs will be shuffled amongst themselves.

options.label: Max Ap Cost
options.description: If Randomize AP Costs is set to Randomize or Distribute, this defined the max AP cost an ability can have.

options.label: Min Ap Cost
options.description: If Randomize AP Costs is set to Randomize or Distribute, this defined the min AP cost an ability can have.

options.label: Day 2 Materials
options.description: The amount of Raft Materials required to access Day 2.

options.label: Homecoming Materials
options.description: The amount of Raft Materials required to access Homecoming (Final Bosses).

options.label: Materials In Pool
options.description: The amount of Raft Materials required to access Homecoming (Final Bosses).

options.label: Stacking World Items
options.description: Multiple world items give you the world's associated key item.

options.label: Halloween Town Key Item Bundle
options.description: Obtaining the Forget-Me-Not automatically gives Jack-in-the-Box as well.
